Germline-somatic interaction - Figure 3

Anton Safonov, Luca Boscolo Bielo, David N Brown

31 December, 2025


Figure 3a: 


## 
##  Two-sided Fisher's Exact Test (usual method using minimum likelihood)
## 
## data:  table(coloh.compare$GL, coloh.compare$coloh)
## p-value < 2.2e-16
## alternative hypothesis: true odds ratio is not equal to 1
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  0.0451 0.1623
## sample estimates:
## odds ratio 
## 0.08670505

Figure 3i: 


## 
##  Two-sided Fisher's Exact Test (usual method using minimum likelihood)
## 
## data:  table(rb1.con.hr$B2, rb1.con.hr$HRD_cons)
## p-value = 0.002117
## alternative hypothesis: true odds ratio is not equal to 1
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##   1.7576 16.5779
## sample estimates:
## odds ratio 
##   5.357828

Figure 3k:

Figure 3k: 


## Call:
## coxph(formula = Surv(time.months, event) ~ RB1_LOH + ET_partner, 
##     data = cdk_b1)
## 
##   n= 564, number of events= 383 
##    (413 observations deleted due to missingness)
## 
##                         coef exp(coef) se(coef)     z Pr(>|z|)    
## RB1_LOHRB1_LOH        0.3853    1.4701   0.1089 3.537 0.000405 ***
## RB1_LOHB2             1.1163    3.0534   0.1734 6.438 1.21e-10 ***
## ET_partnerFulvestrant 0.5505    1.7342   0.1089 5.053 4.34e-07 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
##                       exp(coef) exp(-coef) lower .95 upper .95
## RB1_LOHRB1_LOH            1.470     0.6802     1.187     1.820
## RB1_LOHB2                 3.053     0.3275     2.174     4.289
## ET_partnerFulvestrant     1.734     0.5766     1.401     2.147
## 
## Concordance= 0.621  (se = 0.015 )
## Likelihood ratio test= 63.37  on 3 df,   p=1e-13
## Wald test            = 70.58  on 3 df,   p=3e-15
## Score (logrank) test = 74.38  on 3 df,   p=5e-16
